title: Cobblemon: PlayerXP
description: Earn XP from battles alongside your pokemon.
body:
# PlayerXP
Earn XP from battles alongside your pokemon.

This mod works on both the client-side and server-side but will only need to be installed server-side to work on servers.

## Features
This mod is simple, it rewards players alongside their pokemon with experience levels. This is important when playing cobblemon without mob spawns as the only other real XP income is from villagers.

## Config Options
You can find the config file at: `config/playerxp/playerxp.json`

`shouldGiveLevels` - true / false - whether to give levels instead of xp.

`baseXP` - How much xp should be given to the player per pokemon level.

`baseLevels` - How many levels should be awarded to the player per pokemon level if shouldGiveLevels is set to true.



## Dependencies
Cobblemon: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) / [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon/files/5375408)

Fabric-Loader: [Fabric-Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)

Fabric-Api: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) / [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api/files/6321634)

Neoforge: [Neoforge](https://neoforged.net/)
